title: Anime
description:
Стильная декоративная панель для реализации ваших дизайн-проектов. Файл подходит как для плоской лазерной резки, так и для создания объемного рельефа. Узор легко масштабируется под любые размеры без потери качества.
Характеристики:
Форматы: DXF (вектор) и STL (3D модель).
Материалы: Металл (сталь, алюминий), фанера, МДФ, пластик.
Оборудование: Лазерные станки, плазморезы, ЧПУ фрезеры, 3D принтеры.
Назначение: Перегородки, фасадный декор, оформление стен, экраны для радиаторов, элементы мебели.
Преимущества:
Готовность к производству (замкнутые контуры, корректная геометрия).
Адаптивность под любую толщину материала.
Современный геометрический узор.
Идеальное решение для архитекторов, дизайнеров интерьеров и мастеров ЧПУ.

title: Anime
description:
Stylish decorative panel to realize your design projects. The file is suitable both for flat laser cutting and for creating three-dimensional relief. The pattern can be easily scaled to any size without loss of quality.
Features:
Formats: DXF (vector) and STL (3D model).
Materials: Metal (steel, aluminum), plywood, MDF, plastic.
Equipment: Laser machines, plasma cutters, CNC mills, 3D printers.
Purpose: Partitions, facade decor, wall decoration, radiator screens, furniture elements.
Advantages:
Ready for production (closed contours, correct geometry).
Adaptability to any material thickness.
Modern geometric pattern.
Ideal solution for architects, interior designers and CNC masters.

title: Fantasy Mini Collection (multiple poses)
description: Collection of fantasy miniatures for tabletop gaming! These minis were created in DesktopHero, which allows you to customize miniatures and export the STLs for free. See us on Kickstarter! I'm including the DesktopHero character files (.dhc) so you can load them into DesktopHero and change the weapons or tweak the clothing or pose. Enjoy! Credits for characters: Kamron Duncan, Gerard Hyland, kevin_mic, backer303, nicoledelancret Credits for individual assets: backer207 (Apron), Bees_Knees (side bok), chdmann (Inquistior Left Shoulder), CommanderMeow (Coin pouch), CommanderMeow (Demon horns), CommanderMeow (Pirate coat), dazle (Basic Leather Pauldron), dazle (Basic Leathers - 02), dazle (Basic Leathers - Normal), DeltaFoxtrotZulu (Square base), lisandro52 (Lantern), Melic (BasePave1), norseknight (Rolled Sleeve), OldFarticus (Backpack Small), Urbanizedsquid (Flute V1.3), Xenon472 (CowboyHat)

title: Ulvheim building and ruins - A
description: Produced with the awesome support from my Patrons! This is the first Ulvheim building. Stone buildings suitable for medieval or fantasy scenarios. There is one intact two level building (no roof though) and several ruined versions. You can put almost any second level ruin on top of the intact version. I print these with 5% infill. Nothing require support. Roofs === One of my awesome patrons, Evan, wanted a roof to go with this. What can I say besides: I love open source, great work Evan. https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:2766732 Support me on Patreon === This thing is delivered with the outstanding help from my patrons. To help me deliver quality printable terrain models, please pledge $1 or more: [](https://www.patreon.com/terrain4print) Video presentation === https://youtu.be/o-Dzfm7IvpM

title: DnD Dice Book
description:
All 3DTechDesigns STLs are protected under Copyright Law.
When purchased on Cults3D you have the right to print it for personal use.
To legally sell prints of my designs a **monthly active** subscription on patreon is required:
https://www.patreon.com/3dtechdesigns

----------------------------------------------------------

REEL:
https://www.instagram.com/reel/C8uo13stHxf/?igsh=MW00b3c1dGV2amJjbQ==

This book box stores your favourite DnD accessories. It comes with different inserts, with one of them also being a functional dice tower, please check out the pictures to see the 3 different insert types A,B and C

To assemble the box, the only thing needed are two pieces of 1,75mm filament which act as the hinge of the book, you can then also secure the filament pieces with a small drop of CA glue.

If you decide to print the multicolor variant (meant for single material printers), you will also need to glue the different colored pieces together.

A multimaterial 3MF for BambuStudio is included, if you own a multicolor Bambu printer

**Dimensions of the book:**
- 150x115x55mm

**Minimum printbed size:**
180x180x180mm

**UPDATE 2024.07.29:**
- added a version of the book with the possibility to print the different accent colors as seperate prints. This is best suited for single extruder printers or to reduce print waste on multimaterial printers. The parts need to be glued together afterwards using CA-glue.

**UPDATE 2024.08.29:**
- added icon plates for 12 different character classes. 

**UPDATE 2025.01.12:**
- added "PageBox_TypeD.stl", which can be printed instead of the standard PageBox.stl if you want to fit one or two card decks inside the book.
- added "PageBox_TypeD_Insert_Single.stl" & "PageBox_TypeD_Insert_Double.stl" in the "Compartments"-Folder, which can be used with the new "PageBox_TypeD.stl"

**UPDATE 2025.03.08:**
- added "Leather_Inserts_TopBottom_MC_Print" to the "MultiColor_Print_Book"-Folder, which was requestet by some customers. These can be printed instead of the scales
  if you prefer the leather look.

title: High IQ Space Arthropod Back-up Dancers
description:
A couple of pals for my previously posted, Neurothrope variant. Both these models are based on the same body and lower jaw, so all the arms, back plates and head plates can be swapped amongst the three. Maybe one day I'll do some part swaps for Venomthropes, too...
But for now, Enjoy! =)

title: Fates End - Dice Tower - FREE Wizard Tower!
description:
"By downloading this item, you agree: 1) Not to distribute the files 2) Not to sell prints of this item. You ARE permitted to print this item as a gift. Only Merchants with an active License may print & Sell FatesEnd items.
🔗MMF: bit.ly/FatesEndTribe 
🔗PATREON: bit.ly/FatesEndPatreon
While you're at it, check out Furhaven:
bit.ly/FurhavenGame
════════════════════════════════════
EASY TO PRINT! Most of our files are designed to 3D Printed easily without supports! (Supports are the WORST!) Due to the nature of miniatures, our miniatures & ornaments are pre-supported if needed!

All FatesEnd files are designed to fit on a 7""x7""x7"" print bed area or larger! All dice towers are designed to work with standard 20mm dice at 100% scale. (*Dice set/tower scales are determined by the size of the D20 in the set.) If you need to scale the files, you may use the Dice Scale Chart found here: fatesend.net/resources"

title: Townsefolk: Starter Set
description:
Hear ye, hear ye!

Introducing Townsfolke, a series of civilian miniatures appropriate for any medieval fantasy tabletop game!

All models are supplied without bases and print 100% support free. Townsfolke are scaled for standard miniature gaming (30mm scale), and 15mm scale versions are included as well!

This free set includes: (Penitents with two forms of burdens, a prisoner, three town guard variants, a full set of tavern patrons, a hedge wizard, a trumpeter, a strolling knight, a lookout, and a ferryman with his boat).



*Please note: You're downloading digital files only, not physical miniatures.

title: Army of the Earthenkind
description:
Introducing the Army of the Earthenkind, a full, easy-to-print force of (earth) elemental guardians.

These designs are scaled for standard miniature gaming (compatible in size with Reaper, Games Workshop, et cetera) and are optimized to print on home FDM (or SLA/DLP) machines and will print without need of supports.

This set also includes a one-sheet PDF with 5E-compatible rules, background info, and story hooks for the earthenkind.

You can find us on Patreon if you would like to support us in designing more free miniature collections.



*Please note: You're downloading digital files only, you're not buying physical miniatures.

title: Sculptris Dummies: Star Wars Alien Rebels
description:
May the 4th be with you!

These are the parts I used to make my recent Legion-compatible rebel variants. The OBJ files included can be loaded into Sculptrtis and re-posed/modified to your heart's content. (CTRL + D will de-select all the parts once they're loaded, btw.) The STL accessories can be combined in another program once you have your model posed (I like to use 3dBuuilder for this). The flat plane is included to help you get a sense of where the bottom of the feet should be, just delete it in Sculptris before you export your final build.

If you like this kind of thing and want to see more of it, consider supporting us on Patreon. Our patrons get access to bonus models and games (among some other perks) and that support helps us post lots of content to Thingiverse as well.

Enjoy!

title: Moving Gears Steampunk RPG Dice Box
description:
A dice box for the distinguished Victorian gentleman or gentlewoman! It sports over 15 gears on the front, top, and sides that turn hypnotically as you open it. This dice box is my own custom design. Nifty wood-grain pattern on the surface makes it look like an aged wood treasure chest, no matter what material it's printed in! It can hold around 30 regular-sized dice. It's kept tightly closed with a classy keyhole clasp. Whether you want to impress your friends with this pinnacle of Victorian engineering or you just want to lug your dice around in a convenient fashion, you'll be the envy of the party with this wicked case!

Bottom of the box is separated into two files: "Steampunk Dice Box Bottom.stl" and "Brass fittings bottom.stl." Import them both at the same time into your slicer and you have the full bottom of the box. Do the same for "Steampunk dice box top.stl" and "brass fittings top.stl" and you will have the lid.
Gears are separated into "front gears," "Left gears," "Right gears," and "top gears." You can lay them on the bed and print them in place. Use the pictures in this listing to find out where each gear goes (they have unique patterns to help differentiate them). 

I made this box about 3 years ago and I was new to 3D modeling at the time so please forgive me if it is confusing. Feel free to message me if you have any issues. 

Gears may not actually be able to hypnotize people. But you never know until you try.

title: Daring Delvers: Support Free Adventurers
description:
These 15 player character models are collected from various free posts we've made over the years, and come with character record sheets for our [CRUX roleplaying system, which is available as a free download from our own site](http://www.illgottengames.net/cruxuniversalroleplaying), as well as rules for [Pocket-Tactics](http://www.illgottengames.net/pocket-tactics) (our 3d pint-and-play strategy board game) and [Open-Tactics](http://www.illgottengames.net/opentactics) (our open-source, miniatures-agnostic wargaming rules).

All models are supplied without bases and print 100% support free. Daring Delvers are scaled for standard miniature gaming (30mm scale), and 15mm versions are included as well! Blank bases are included for both scales and, if you want a quick tutorial on adding them before printing, [check out this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HGCwjUJVZ-0).

For those of you thinking about [supporting us on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/illgottengames?fan_landing=true), our patrons get special weekly model releases, access to new storefront releases and our entire back catalog, plus licensing options to sell printed versions of our designs.

title: Prisoner Slaves
description:
Due to semi lewd nature this model set, This kit is only available here on my personal 3d modelling account rather than accessible via TMC. This grimdark set would make for good RPG miniatures and objective markers.

The kit came about while practicing figure sculpting, focusing on 28mm detail, proportions and expression.

test prints are resin, made from the presupports provided.

For more designs do check out my patreon! https://www.patreon.com/themakerscult

title: Octopunk Dice Tower - SUPPORT FREE!
description:
**Check out my newest Kickstarter campaign, Furhaven! A family friendly 5e compatible RPG! (With 3D Printable Towers & Props!) >> http://kck.st/33FAsmD

Octopunk Dice Tower!

*Update: I made the pegs larger on all of the trays.

I created this dice tower for my Kickstarter campaign: Fates End! This Dice Tower is designed to work with typical 16mm (based on D6) dice sets. The D20 in that set is 20mm. If you want to print this tower smaller, you can print it at 60% for tiny 10mm dice sets.

This set of files includes a single version of the dice tower, and a version split into two parts for easy printing on Ender3, Prusa Mini and similar printers. (Two part = DT2_Top + DT2_Btm)

Also includes 6 different types of dice trays to catch your dice!

1) Small Smooth Tray - tray-sm-smo

2) Small Textured tray - tray-sm-tx

3) Large Smooth Tray - tray-lg-smo

4) Large Textured Tray - tray-lg-smo

5) Dice Holder Tray (large) - tray-dicehold

6) Open Lock Tray - tray-openlock

 

*Non-commercial License. Please don’t sell prints of this file, you’re welcome to give them away as gifts though.

 

For more details, please visit:

FatesEnd.net

title: Crystal Cluster
description:
A small cluster of crystals that may hide in the underdark below.

DISCLAMER:
I make these models mostly for my own enjoyment. I find it fun to share them with you and I try to hold a professional level of quality to the models. If you use the models and feel that you could spare a dollar or two, a tip would be appreciated. Thank you!

title: Guild Mage Redux (32mm scale)
description:
A remix (changing pose and adding detail) to my [original guild mage model](https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:2672478). The design prints support-free, as per usual. Included is an un-based and based version.

For those of you thinking about supporting us on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/illgottengames), our patrons get special access to our store releases as they come out (not to mention license options to sell printed versions of our designs).

Enjoy!

title: Magical Dice Box
description:
All 3DTechDesigns STLs are protected under Copyright Law.
When purchased on Cults3D you have the right to print it for personal use.
To legally sell prints of my designs a **monthly active** subscription on patreon is required:
https://www.patreon.com/3dtechdesigns

----------------------------------------------------------
Introducing another great way to store your dice sets. This magical box has 7 compartments but only one opening door. With each turn, the door will open and reveal another dice. 
This is thanks to a mechanism inside, which turns the dice container with 7 fixed positions exactly from one compartment to the next with each turn.

You could also use it to store other small items in the compartments measuirng approx. 25x25x25mm

There are no extra tools or glue needed for assembly, everything is printed and the assembly is very easy.

**Would like to see the box in action and a quick assembly guide? Here is the link to it:**
https://youtu.be/kjvVI9E10Ok

Dimensions of the assembled box:
110x110x70mm

title: ClickLock building-system
description:
This is a new modular system for your D&D table. I know, I know... who needs another system? Well... I really wanted a system that worked like dungeon/open -forge, but was faster to print and with a printable locking-system. So here's the ClickLock system. I will continue to develop the system as I go, but these are the main pieces.

Note that there are already some more pieces finished (doors/roundedwalls/prisonbars) in the system, but my Patreon supporters get's a two week head start with all new models.

DISCLAMER:
If you like my models and want more of them... concider [supporting me on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/dndcrafting). The support enables me to continue making models and sharing them for free with everyone! Thank you!

title: Tower of Darkness (28mm/Heroic scale)
description:
Well, we just picked up a CR10S 500, and to test that 500mm X/Y/Z, we're going to start doing a massive monthly (Monthly Massive ™?) design. This one is about 22" tall (14" for the body of the tower and another 8" for the top. The interior is fully textured, with stairs and platforms winding to the top.

Before anyone asks, no, we won't be splitting models from this series into pieces that can print on more common printers, -BUT- we are leaving it open to remixes, so one of you could be that hero! We printed at a .2 layer height and it used about 1 1/4 spools of black PLA (and took about 3 days). Model is shown with a bunch of our ScatterBlocks.

Quick plugs: If you're interested in supporting us on Patreon, you can get access to our full range of products, exclusive models, and sell printed versions of our designs (depending on pledge levels). Also, we're currently Kickstarting our Townsfolke support-free printable villager series, so drop on by if that interests you.

Enjoy!

title: Ancient Lich
description:
For free updates, join patreon now at https://www.patreon.com/c/arcamundi

A levitating Lich casting a spell, floating on an ancient stair where candles burn.

In the Last War, while Cyre built an army of moving machines powered by arcana, Karrnath relied on the flesh and bones of its own fallen comrades. Thus, hordes of unded soldiers stood next the Black Wolves in the Red army. Some say there is a secret cult, born in the womb of the Blood of Vol, led by those who knew how to wield powerful arcana before dying in battle.

title: Clank Figure - Ratchet & Clank
description:
This is a 3D printed Clank model from the video game and movie Ratchet & Clank. At the scale given, it'll end up being about 6 inches tall. I created this model in Fusion 360 and printed it on my Robo 3D R1 printer using Hatchbox White PLA.

If you'd like to see more, watch this video: https://youtu.be/T2Ly_pLtiOQ

Post Processing:
Step 1: Assemble and glue the pieces together using super glue.
Step 2: Prime the model with plastic primer.
Step 3: Paint the metallic finish on him, we used Krylon Hammered Metal spray paint through an airbrush.
Step 4: Paint the details. We used water based acrylic paints with a paint brush to get the dark gray, green, and red areas painted.

Something to keep in mind while assembling is his position. Try to position his arms and legs so that he'll stand on his own and not fall over.

Print Settings:
Layer Height: 0.3mm (0.1mm for arms)
Infill: 20%
Supports/Raft: None

title: Batarang (Batman: Arkham Knight)
description:
Who doesn't love some awesome Batarangs? Well now you can print your own from the video game Batman Arkam City (or Knight). For more details and to see the finished prints check out this video: https://youtu.be/Jm9yt5Pf-V4

I printed them in PLA on my Robo 3D R1. Then my wife did some amazing post processing on them. Her basic steps were:
Step 1: Sand any rough spots
Step 2: Prime with White Plastic Primer
Step 3: Paint with Matte Black Spray Paint
Step 4: Mask off everything but the blades using tape or playdoh
Step 5: Paint Chrome on the blades
Step 6: Assemble and enjoy!

The Batarang comes in 4 parts: 2 blades, a top and a bottom coupler in the middle. The blades press fit onto the bottom and the top press fits on top of those. You may need a little glue to keep the top part on. I used super glue. Just make sure to leave the blades glue free as they are designed to rotate so they can open and close.

title: halo magnum
description:
here it is!!! the halo magnum!! after an extreme test print the model is finally done!! :D
this is a 1:1 scale prop of the halo 5 magnum.
features of the model include hammer that can be activated by the trigger, moving slider with a lock to lock it open and mag with mag release. 

happy printing XD

video time laps incoming!!!

wanna see what is I'm working on next? or if you guys wanna vote on what I'm gonna make next? keep an eye out on my social media :D
https://www.facebook.com/OddworksDesign/
https://www.instagram.com/oddworks3d/

wanna help me continue to make models have a look at my Patreon.
Patrons also get exclusive models.
https://www.patreon.com/OddWorks

INSTRUCTIONS.
this model is a bit more complex than my there model and has a few tricky bits in its assembly.

you will need 
x19 m2.5 x 12mm bolts 
x2   m2.5 x 16mm bolts 
x22 m2.5 square nuts 
x2 spring 5.6mm x 17.5 (one for the mag to hold the bullet)


x2 elastic bands (between 2.5cm and 4cm) for the hammer and slider 

tips for making the model.

make sure to add support blocker in all the bolt holes.

if you find the rubber bands are loose twist them a few times this increase there tension.

be very careful when removing the Barrle frame from your build plates there very fragile.

links to the parts I used!

M2.5 bolts.
https://www.ebay.co.uk/itm/383691428393?_trkparms=ispr%3D1&hash=item5955ca9229:g:EM8AAOSwyZhfRQyn&amdata=enc%3AAQAFAAACcBaobrjLl8XobRIiIML1V4Imu%252Fn%252BzU5L90Z278x5ickkxFtV7J5P58ubuVigtBH%252Fe2MQwsX0Dz4lXCncSlq76N2AHblYh501o%252FP5UBWLhCuw4f%252F%252Blu21NmISoa%252F0XQ57Roz3wqyoyof9zqh0odVisunFmJ%252BvS9ONbukE7t5GxPWkgDv865HnDm6IV1zzgRrsOq2Se3W0PJVD%252BNGsUfUnW2M4C2ySG7UlR7fhAnGLNCDv%252FAIVoOd1G9A8NVO%252BBdY8NconrS6Ic%252FpPCgxCNPCkjSaGkZgVFxFLxAAzUPrd5BkeKiTyo%252BMM8QLmBXinfJaLIasvqmZCjsZa8z9y1Y20AD74AfmbfekxD6JrHm6xcwvIcXxzy42oRx3dosRWvg0KzvvO0EXuyatXBQQm5HXQGla9Sws2y%252BPYDpysT6vaZ80D8dWAadIeu3xEwJuqywDCpQrtm%252BMRv%252FipJSx%252BXjTlc9ETfY77l3YZENzJtgZVEbZ2FT%252BffEu%252FsdvgvUj7LBFwMMrl7yVl%252FZoGmbV6Hncyz8yEGBwx9pogjGbbaw%252BBTggYqXlPF9fSvAYCTcRY1XWPDKLE9wUNCXS23Rs6UhlRHLQbuJD%252B%252B4sTnoNV9hTUYAW%252FP0rkJ6EFje6OXpDho31NVBiofwuItCh1d2%252FZIfGJyWLXndh%252Bj4coW1%252BucSKft2B77HbQUhBQjCR8Symx28DVQOCF3aNbQNj2q7JPdEWicMHPIupWEPJ%252F6Y061cVUQEPTs8pcE3INn24AdjgWnxKtEyojDRzinz3snhjsB7aHIOojBlZ3js6IxEpbqMQYZvMD%252F%252F%252BLLXToug1NYDSl0t3BQA%253D%253D%7Ccksum%3A383691428393e96325482e7b4bdfb282ed4109a38741%7Campid%3APL_CLK%7Cclp%3A2334524

title: Gengar 3D Printable Pokémon Card; Pokemon TCG
description:
Gengar 1st Edition 3D Printable Card.

Each download comes with the following:
- STL Full Card
- STL Split; Character and Card with connector
- STL Full Card Presupported
- 3MF Pre-Colored files
- 0.2 and 0.4 Nozzle Presets 
- Each 3MF download come with:
	a) Full Color
	b) Simple (Three to Four Color)
	c) Full and Split printing options

STL files are scaled to scale of the original TCG game well as 3MF files are increased to 150%.

For 3MF printing 0.2 Nozzles are RECOMMENDED for text clarity.

Wall Mount designed into the back for easy hanging.

Prohibition: selling/exchanging digital files or 3D prints.

Leave print reviews, so other people can make a buying decision.
Thank you for your support!

title: Full Sized Halo Plasma Pistol
description:
Please watch this video for more information and to see it in action: https://youtu.be/EcaRAhVgwy8

This is a 3D Printed Plasma Pistol from the Halo games. Specifically the Type-25 Plasma Pistol from Halo 4. This is not the Type-54 Plasma Pistol in Halo 5. I created the models using Fusion 360 and printed it out on my Robo 3D R1 Printer using Hatchbox PLA. My wife painted filled the cracks with caulking, prime it with spraypaint primer, painted it using an airbrush, and finished up the details with acrylic paint.

Print Settings:
Layer Height: 0.3mm
Infill: 20%
Print Time: ~34 hours
Filament Used: ~0.6kg

title: hollow knight air attack
description: Bring your favorite Hollow Knight moment to life with this 3D printable Air Attack Scene. This model captures the dynamic action of a Knight in flight attacking enemies above – perfect for fans, dioramas, game collectors, or display pieces.

title: Slime Rancher Largos! - Pink Rock, Pink Tabby, Rock Tabby, Pink Phosphor
description:
Adding to my 3D Printed slime collection this time is the Largos from the Dry Reef region. I created the models in Fusion 360, I used my previous models and scaled and mix them together.

After I finished modeling I prepared the models using Simplify3D, then printed then on several of my printers (listed below).

Then my wife painted these slimes using a combination of primer, airbrush and paintbrush paints. She mostly used the airbrush for the main colors and all the fancy gradient work. Then she used her paintbrush for the smaller details like the eyes and mouth.

I'm really happy with how these came out. Let me know what you think! And I'll be adding more to this Slime Rancher series very soon!

Printers: CR10 / Prusa i3 MK2S / Robo R2
Filament: PolySmooth
Layer Height: 0.1mm
Supports: No (Yes for Phosphor)
Print Time: ~3 hours each
Modeled in Fusion 360
Smoothed in the Polysher

title: Mechanical Spinning Top Dice Box
description:
********************
******************* Patent-Pending *******************
********************

Please tag me on social media if you post the print! 🙌: 
*Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mike_shapiro_designs/
*Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AutomaticAlchemy/
*TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@mike_shapiro_designs

Changelog:

- 03/26/2022: Made top pegs and gear frame pegs stronger. 

- 08/08/2021: Adding Triangle V3 STL which has a tighter tolerance peg. Also added rounded edges so that it doesn't get caught on the Ring.

- 08/07/2021: Added V2 Gear Frame and Spur Gear STLs to make the pegs more secure

- 07/10/2021: New Triangle STL has been uploaded

----------------------------------------------------------------

This is a geared box with a unique opening mechanism.

When you twist the base of the box, the triangular top pieces swing open, and then close again on the other side. 

IMPORTANT: In your slicer, scale down all of the files to 90%. I overestimated when I first created the design.

I included a picture of a smaller scale version with all the parts laid out.

Parts: 
Ring x1
Body x1
Gear Frame x1
Triangle x6
Small Gear x6

title: Geared Spinning Doors Box Print in Place
description:
All 3DTechDesigns STLs are protected under Copyright Law.
When purchased on Cults3D you have the right to print it for personal use.
To legally sell prints of my designs a **monthly active** subscription on patreon is required:
https://www.patreon.com/3dtechdesigns

----------------------------------------------------------
100% print in place box  with a mechanical opening mechanism to store small items, no assembly required.

**The only thing to do after printing, is to cut one small support on each of the doors. To see exactly where to cut, please have a look at this video:**
https://youtu.be/TqICdstOHko


 I highly recommend to spray some kind of lubricant between the moving parts in order to reduce friction, if the mechanism is too stiff. However, if the printer is well dialed in and you get the tolerances right, it works just fine without any post processing or lubricant. I testprinted it with a BambuLab P1S and a Voron 2.4, both without problems.

There is also a testprint included to try out the tolerances of the mechanism prior to printing the whole box.

UPDATE 2023.05.04; V2:
Reinforced the gear links on the top doors, since they were too delicate for some printers. They are much stronger now

UPDATE 2023.06.11; V3:
Adjusted some tolerances to make printing easier. Made the gear links thicker in diameter do increase strength

UPDATE 2024.01.13 - V4:
Redesigned the whole lower gear section and adjusted gear alignment. The new model has increased stability and should overall be easier to print on most printers

title: Mechanical Deck and Dice Box
description:
All 3DTechDesigns STLs are protected under Copyright Law.
When purchased on Cults3D you have the right to print it for personal use.
To legally sell prints of my designs a **monthly active** subscription on patreon is required:
https://www.patreon.com/3dtechdesigns

----------------------------------------------------------

This box is designed to store a set of up to seven dice and one ore multiple decks of cards. Moreover it functions as a dice tower.

Reel: https://www.instagram.com/share/reel/BAC_nz2I0a

**Cards compartment:**
The cards compartment measures 70x70x92mm, which means it can take most playing cards as well as sleeved cards.
The cards compartment can also be divided by inserting up to six card dividers.

**Card display:**
The download contains three different versions of the box, with two of them offering the option to display a commander card on the outside:
- sleeved or double sleeved card (max. 67x92x1,2mm).
- Mini Snap Holder hard shell sleeve (max. 69x95x5mm)

**Dice compartment:**
Under the iris lid hides a small dice tray, which can be removed to use the box as a dice tower.
The lid has a clever two stage mechanism, which first releases the clicking lock before opening the actual iris leafs. This makes it possible to fully open and close the lid without any friction when used as a dice tower, but also provides the option to lock the iris leafs when the lid is rotatet back all the way to secure the dice for transport.

**Dice tower:**
When the card deck and the dice tray is removed, the door on the bottom can be pulled out, which also moves  a flap inside the box to ensure, that the dice roll out of the box. The dice door also clicks in the closed position, so it will not fall out by its own.

**Assembly:**
To assemble the box, the only thing needed are two pieces of 1,75mm filament which act as the hinge of the lid and the lid flap, you can then also secure the filament pieces with a small drop of CA glue.

**Assembly-guide on youtube:**
https://youtu.be/46yPGfle0ig

If you decide to print the multicolor variant with seperately printed color accents, you will also need to glue the different colored pieces together.

**Dimensions of the assembled box:**
- 89x92x141mm

**Minimum printbed size:**
160x160x160mm

UPDATE 2025.04.07:
increased the thickness of the cards display tray from 0.7mm to 1,2mm.
therefore added:
- Box_w_CardDisplay_V2
- Box_w_CardDisplay_Supported_V2
- Box_w_CardDisplay_ColorAccents_V2
- Box_w_CardDisplay_ColorAccents_Supported_V2

-2025.05.06 - V3:
- added a new version of the design, which now allows to use a mini snap card holder (hard shell sleeve) for the display card
It was tested with Ultra Pro Mini Snap Holders. The holder must not exceed the following dimensions in order to fit:
95x69x5mm

-2025.05.11 - V4:
- slightly increased the tolerances of the snap card holder compartment to make it easier to print

title: MUG TRAP: SELF-ADJUSTING COASTER
description:
Catch your drink into a trap! This is mostly print-in-place, self-adjusting coaster, that needs **NO supports**.

**”Mostly” because mechanism, body and chain are Print in place**, the only printed separately part is the oval pad, which you need just put on top of the main body. 

Clearance between moving parts is very big, so every printer should print this design without any problem.

**The Trap Coaster automatically adjusts to the size of the object**, it can grip both a large mug and a standard aluminum can.

**Follow us** here on [Cults]( https://cults3d.com/en/users/KrakDrag/3d-models) and on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/krakdrag3d/) to stay updated on upcoming designs!

**To legally sell PRINTS** of my designs, you can obtain authorization by joining my: [Membership](https://tinyurl.com/KrakDragMembership) 

Happy printing and share your new coaster!

**Also check out my new design – 🐱 Cute Cat 🐱 Mouse Bungee And Cable Holder 🔌:**
[creation cute-cat-mouse-bungee-and-cable-holder]

title: Automatic Dice Tower
description:
All 3DTechDesigns STLs are protected under Copyright Law.
When purchased on Cults3D you have the right to print it for personal use.
To legally sell prints of my designs a **monthly active** subscription on patreon is required:
https://www.patreon.com/3dtechdesigns

----------------------------------------------------------

**REEL:**
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DLVZBq5s0-L/?igsh=YzIwdWp2Y2JqZzho

After a lot of testing I am happy to finally release a new mechanical dice tower. What makes this dice tower special, is that it rolls the dice fully automatically by a simple up and down movement of a lever. A platform moves the dice upwards, where they are then dropped back down by a trapdoor.
It does not matter how quickly the lever is operated because the trapdoor onto which the dice are thrown always opens at exactly the right moment.

**Assembly:**
The assembly is great fun due to its simplicity. A large part of the mechanism is print-in-place designs, meaning it comes fully assembled and functional from the print plate. No extra tools or glue are needed because everything is printed.
As can be seen in the pictures, two versions of the tower are included, one of which does not require the print in place planetary gear, thus reducing the number of printed parts.

**Assembly-guide on youtube:**
https://youtu.be/CQ-179IuEYM

**Dimensions of the assembled tower:**
- 119x140x133mm

**Minimum printbed size:**
140x140x140mm

**Amount of filament needed:**
~400g of PLA

title: Purple Worm Dice Tower  update 2.0
description:
Updated new Bigger basefor more dice to better hold on to the dice when rolled. I recommend doing three-piece Tower it has much better dice retention. It does not need to be printed with supports but I do recommend a large brim to hold secure to the plate while printing.Added Bambu AMS color files
https://www.instagram.com/p/Cax_G0FgNFE/?utm_medium=copy_link All parts I support free printing. There are two different versions here for you to choose from. The first model is broken down into three individual parts , so you can paint or print in different colors. The second version is one complete model, Just sit it on the plate and print.
These models are made with a fdm printer in mind I did not test anything on resin .For personal use only please.

title: Dynamod Dungeon Tiles - Sample Pack
description:
The Next Evolution of Dungeon Tiles
------------------------------------------------

### Dynamod creates 3D printable dungeon tile systems that are highly modular with dynamically changing parts, making table top gaming more engaging than ever before.

* This is a sample pack, get all the STL files from: https://dynamod.games
* Watch GamingGeek's Review: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zyaXwo7hmKQ
* Watch Short Demo Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jDcJXRLZz4k

### More information on our website: https://dynamod.games

The Dynamod dungeon tile system offers the following exciting and engaging features:
------

* **Perfect grids** without any wall offsets, making it possible to recreate any existing map grid
* Dynamically switchable walls, doors and terrain provide **full fog of war mechanics** to your board game
* **Walls and doors** slide in from the top and can be **changed by simply lifting them up** and putting new ones in without clip detachment, this makes it very easy to change closed doors into open doors or walls into secret doors
* Walls sit in the middle of two tiles, sharing the space and offering **full square inch playing space everywhere** without oversized terrain.
* The tiles are 32x32mm and the terrain 28x28mm.
* All your **existing scenery feels right at home** from square inch-based games, like the HeroQuest reissue
* **Fast and flexible tile assembly** with three choices that work for any gameplay style:
  * The tiles are **stable without clips for quick gameplay** and have a slight snap and an alignment feature to prevent them from freely sliding around
  * The tiles can hold **optional 4mm diameter x 2mm thick disc magnets** directly without the need for clips
  * The tiles can use **optional sturdy clips** for more permanent arrangement without feeling loose or wiggly
* Tiles are a structural base in which the **terrain snaps in from above**, this allows for tile reuse or even for switching terrain during gameplay, the floor can for instance become a pit trap
* **Filament painted terrain** versions, offering detailed color that can be printed with any FDM printer
* Pre-configured **larger rooms with multiple tiles** for even quicker setup
* Assembly is fully **mechanical** and requires **no glue**
* **Fast print** times and **conservative material** usage
* Perfect integration into 3D printed **StageTop board game table**
* Designed both for **FDM** and **resin** printing
* Full set of **remix tools** to adapt existing STL models you already have
* **Detailed print instructions** for PrusaSlicer, Cura, IdeaMaker and Simplify3D
* All models have been printed and tested on multiple FDM and resin printers from different brands

title: Owlbear - Tabletop Miniature
description:
Owlbears were monstrous beasts, their heads were like those of owls with the bodies of bears covered in thick fur and feathers.

Owlbear for use in any epic adventure! Compatible with D&D and tabletop role-playing games.

Both 32mm and 54mm scaling options provided!

If you like what I do please consider joining my Patreon for $1 where you can get 50% OFF the entire store, early access to new designs and vote for what I sculpt next!

patreon.com/yasashiikyojinstudio

title: HEART BOX WITH WORKING ZIPPER
description:
**This is box with a working zipper functioning as a locking mechanism!**

**The design is 100[%] print-in-place and requires NO supports.** After printing you only need to cut thin strip of plastic between two halfs with knife [(Showed on demo video)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Lufu7rN2-J4).

**Package include standard version and with a built-in brim for easier printing.**

*Update 05.03.24* - Added additional version with looser tolerances, making it easier to print, while ensuring better zipper functionality. 

To open/close the box, use the attached slider similarly to a real zipper. To open, start with the side of the slider with the smaller heart cutout. To close, start with the side with the bigger heart.
 
The first few times might feel a little rough, but after few slides, it will start to work smoothly. If your first slider insertion seems very tight, you can try lightly sanding the sides of the slider's runners for better fit.

**Follow us** here on [Cults]( https://cults3d.com/en/users/KrakDrag/3d-models) and on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/krakdrag3d/) to stay updated on upcoming designs!

**To legally sell PRINTS** of my designs, you can obtain authorization by joining my: [Membership](https://tinyurl.com/KrakDragMembership) 

Happy printing and share your new Zipper Box! 

**Also check out my new design – 🐱 Cute Cat 🐱 Mouse Bungee And Cable Holder 🔌:**
[creation cute-cat-mouse-bungee-and-cable-holder]
